embeds.title: About Exton Server Pass
embeds.description: Looking to boost your community's safety and efficiency? With the Server Pass, your Discord gets full access to the Exton system – ideal for teams and growing projects. Give your community the tools they need to stay ahead.

embeds.title: Tiers
embeds.description:
:warning: *Repeated checks don't count. For more details, see our [docs](https://exton-scam-tracker.gitbook.io/docs) to review our terms and services.*

:warning: *Spots are limited to maintain optimal server performance and ensure dedicated support for all users*

fields.name: Server Lite (**5% off** → $14.25 per month! :tada: Total $42.75 for 3 months)
fields.value:
:white_check_mark: 3 reused username checks per month
:white_check_mark: Twitter Monitor in the server
:white_check_mark: Automated raffle entries via AlphaBot (Limit: 1 account)

:hourglass_flowing_sand: Only 8 spots available

fields.name: Server Pro (**16% off** → $16.66 per month! :tada: Total $49.99 for 3 months)
fields.value:
:white_check_mark: Unlimited reused username checks
:white_check_mark: Full bot installation and access in your community
:white_check_mark: Allows specific roles to run Twitter checks directly in your server
:white_check_mark: Twitter Monitor with no usage limits (Beta)
:white_check_mark: Access to exclusive collections and VIP giveaways on Rego Raffles
:white_check_mark: Automated raffle entries via AlphaBot (Limit: 5 accounts)
